Graph Article

This article uses a JSON-LD @graph array structure where the article node is the second entry in the graph. The first entry is a WebSite node without a datePublished field. The extractor must iterate through graph nodes to find the one with datePublished.

This tests REQ-003 and EDGE-007: when multiple JSON-LD article nodes exist only some have datePublished, the first node with a parseable datePublished wins regardless of position in the array. The WebSite node should be skipped and the Article node should match.
